calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name, Gender and Issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Matthew Dillon Boucher was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jennifer Kitten Dillon.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.

Decree Changing Name and Gender was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-17-2010 Reset To Jun-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Petitioner Matthew Dillon Boucher was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court requires further information from petitioner in order to proceed with today's hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to Tuesday, June 22, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
